segments.text: It looks like he's bringing the fight to Samsora quite a lot, too.
And yeah, he just hit him all the way over there, and he went for the chase.
This man, not shy about attacking.
Maybe wanting to undo his reputation as a camping player.

full_text: It looks like he's bringing the fight to Samsora quite a lot, too. And yeah, he just hit him all the way over there, and he went for the chase. This man, not shy about attacking. Maybe wanting to undo his reputation as a camping player.
